greeting: You've climbed higher than most ever will.
Now stand before the throne and prove your worth.
blunder: You sought a crown and somehow misplaced your entire army along the way.
I've seen kingdoms survive plagues more gracefully than this position.
If this were a royal trial, the executioner would've finished early and gone home.
check: Check. The throne grows further away with every mistake.
capture: A ruler must protect his kingdom. You seem to be auctioning yours away.
promotion: Another queen. Even she looks concerned.
default: Long ago, I stood where you stand now.
I defeated my predecessors and claimed the crown.
I thought it was the end of my journey.
The crown is not a reward.
victory: A crown is heavier than it appears. You are not ready to carry it.
The royal court has officially classified your performance as an agricultural accident.
